summary: Comprehensive testing of Interactive Form-Filling System completed. Backend API tests: 20/22 passed (91%). The 2 failures are expected - tests didn't provide manual input for fields without document data. Frontend UI tests passed for profile creation, service selector, and form mode indicator. Found 1 BUG: CONTINUE command after STOP corrupts form data.

critical.issue: CONTINUE command after STOP corrupts form data - 'continue' is stored as field value instead of resuming form
critical.root_cause: In consular_routes.py lines 1010-1016, the CONTINUE handler updates status to 'in_progress' but doesn't return a response. Code falls through to in_progress handler which treats 'continue' as user input for current field.
critical.fix_suggestion: Add return statement after CONTINUE handler that shows current field for confirmation

passed_tests: ✅ Backend: Initial consent prompt shows correctly
✅ Backend: YES command gives consent and starts form at step 1
✅ Backend: Profile not found returns error status
✅ Backend: Invalid service type returns error with available services list
✅ Backend: YES confirms current field and advances to next step
✅ Backend: NO enters edit mode for current field
✅ Backend: Manual value input updates field and asks for confirmation
✅ Backend: Progress tracking (step X/Y and percentage) works correctly
✅ Backend: STOP command pauses application and shows progress summary
✅ Backend: PAUSE command also pauses (alias)
✅ Backend: WAIT command also pauses (alias)
✅ Backend: passport_renewal template has 12 steps
✅ Backend: tourist_visa template has 15 steps
✅ Backend: oci_application template has 18 steps
✅ Backend: birth_registration template has 14 steps
✅ Backend: pcc_application template has 10 steps
✅ Backend: Form session persists form_data in database
✅ Backend: Non-existent session returns 404
✅ Backend: CORRECT and CONFIRM work as YES aliases
✅ Backend: EDIT and CHANGE work as NO aliases
✅ Backend: Review mode shows all fields after completion (manual test)
✅ Backend: SUBMIT generates application ID (manual test)
✅ Backend: EDIT [number] in review mode allows editing specific field
✅ Frontend: ConsularBot page loads correctly
✅ Frontend: Create Profile button visible
✅ Frontend: Profile dialog opens with all fields
✅ Frontend: Profile creation works and shows profile info
✅ Frontend: Start Application button visible after profile creation
✅ Frontend: Service selector shows available services
✅ Frontend: Form Mode indicator shows when form filling active
✅ Frontend: Chat input and send button work
failed_tests: ❌ Backend: test_review_mode_after_all_fields - Test doesn't provide manual input for fields without document data
❌ Backend: test_submit_generates_application_id - Same issue as above
action_items: FIX BUG: CONTINUE command handler in consular_routes.py (lines 1010-1016) needs to return a response after resuming instead of falling through to in_progress handler
The fix should: 1) Get current field from form_session, 2) Get extracted value if available, 3) Return FormFillingResponse showing current field for confirmation
critical_code_review_comments: BUG: consular_routes.py lines 1010-1016 - CONTINUE handler updates status but doesn't return, causing 'continue' to be stored as field value
The CONTINUE/RESUME/PROCEED handler should return a response showing the current field after resuming from paused state

success_rate.backend: 91% (20/22 tests passed - 2 failures expected due to test design)

seed_data_creation: Used existing test profile AMIT-19850315-TEST with documents for form-filling tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Interactive form-filling system tested. Key features working: consent flow, step-by-step confirmation, YES/NO/STOP commands, progress tracking, review mode, SUBMIT with application ID generation, EDIT [number] in review. BUG FOUND: CONTINUE command after STOP corrupts form data. Test profile AMIT-19850315-TEST has documents for testing. Manual fields (source: 'manual') require actual user input - tests that only send 'yes' will get stuck on these fields.

bug_details.title: CONTINUE command corrupts form data
reproduction_steps: 1. Start form filling with profile that has documents
6. Check form_data - 'continue' is stored as field value
bug_details.expected_behavior: CONTINUE should resume form and show current field for confirmation
bug_details.actual_behavior: 'continue' is stored as the value for current field
bug_details.root_cause: CONTINUE handler at lines 1010-1016 updates status but doesn't return a response. Code falls through to in_progress handler which treats 'continue' as user input.
bug_details.suggested_fix: Add return statement after updating status that shows current field for confirmation, similar to how YES handler works

consent_flow.details: Shows consent prompt, accepts YES/I AGREE, archives documents

step_by_step_confirmation.details: Shows one field at a time, extracts values from documents, asks for confirmation

no_command.details: Enters edit mode for current field

stop_command.details: Pauses application and shows progress summary

continue_command.issue: Corrupts form data instead of resuming

progress_tracking.details: Shows step X/Y and percentage with progress bar

manual_value_input.details: Accepts user input for fields without document data

submit.details: Generates application ID in format APP-XXXX-YYYYMMDD-HASH

edit_in_review.details: EDIT [number] allows editing specific field in review mode

form_session_persistence.details: Form data persisted in MongoDB form_sessions collection

service_selector_ui.details: Shows available services with fees and processing times

form_progress_bar_ui.details: Shows progress bar with step count and percentage
